title: French aid worker among three killed in dronestrike in east DRC, M23 rebels say
summary_full: Rebel group blames government for attack on residential area of M23-controlled city of GomaThree people including a French UN aid worker have been killed in a drone attack in Goma, a spokesperson for the M23 rebel group has said.The attack took place at about 4am on Wednesday in the upmarket residential neighbourhood of Himbi in the city, which has been under M23 occupation since January 2025. Continue reading...
